title: Papaya (KIFF 2026)
synopsis: Passionate about flying, a tiny papaya seed in the Amazonian forest must keep moving to avoid rooting. Through perseverance, she discovers the power of her roots, triggering a revolution that transforms her world and fulfills her dreams in an unexpected way.

synopsis_lang.en: Passionate about flying, a tiny papaya seed in the Amazonian forest must keep moving to avoid rooting. Through perseverance, she discovers the power of her roots, triggering a revolution that transforms her world and fulfills her dreams in an unexpected way.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 在亞馬遜雨林裡，一顆木瓜小種子渴望飛翔！為了不被大地束縛入土生根，她經歷了一場場冒險，終於發現隱藏在根部的強大力量。這股力量點燃了一場奇幻革命，不僅翻轉了整個森林，更讓她以最不可思議的方式飛向了夢想的終點。

subtitle: No subtitle
